title: Skill Issue
description: A mod which discourages you to get into dangerous or bad situations
body:
This client-side mod is purposed to **warn the player when getting in dangerous situations** by for example coloring in the screen or kicking you out of the game when an issue is given. At the time of writing, this includes six different situations:

1. The player's health falls to 8 (four hearts)
2. The player's food level falls to 8 (four drumsticks)
3. The player has no totem in the offhand
4. The player has no shield in the offhand
5. The player has no food in the hotbar
6. The player falls in lava without further safety means (the mod kicks you out of the game with your coordinates so you can plan and/or call friends for help)
7. The player falls from a high place (same action as 6.)

The shown color effect is differently colored per issue and the issue with the highest internal priority applies its color. Additionally, you can choose the issues you want to be shaded in an extensive issue menu, accessible per default with the key H!

In the future:
- More issues will be added
- Current issues in detail will be shown on another screen

Please note that the mod is still under development and is more of a hobby project of mine!
